gemini-2.5-pro._note: Tiered: prompts >200k tokens cost input $2.50, output $15.00, cache_read $0.25 per Mtok. Cache storage $4.50/Mtok/hr.

gemini-2.5-flash._note: Text/image/video input; audio input $1.00. Output includes thinking tokens. Cache storage $1.00/Mtok/hr. No >200k context tier.

gemini-2.5-flash-lite._note: Text/image/video input; audio input $0.30. Cache storage $1.00/Mtok/hr. No >200k context tier.

gemini-2.0-flash._note: Text/image/video input; audio input $0.70, audio cache_read $0.175. Cache storage $1.00/Mtok/hr. No >200k context tier.

gemini-2.0-flash-lite._note: DEPRECATED — shut down June 1, 2026. Context caching not available for this model. Prices retained for historical billing.

gemini-2.0-pro._note: No GA billing id. Only shipped as gemini-2.0-pro-exp (experimental, free of charge); never had paid pricing. Not listed on official pricing page or LiteLLM catalog.

gemini-3-pro-preview._note: Current 3.x flagship (page labels it Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview). Tiered: prompts >200k cost input $4.00, output $18.00, cache_read $0.40 per Mtok. Cache storage $4.50/Mtok/hr.

gemini-3-flash-preview._note: Text/image/video input; audio input $1.00, audio cache_read $0.10. Cache storage $1.00/Mtok/hr. No >200k context tier on standard.
